description: Features: 1. The police costume accessories will bring surprise and fun to children. Wearing the police costumes for various role-play activities will help spark their imagination and creativity, and foster connections with family and friends. 2. This set is perfect for year-round use, whether it's Halloween, role-playing, career day, or just having fun with friends. 3. The handcuffs are made of plastic and are very secure. Each handcuff has a safety device on the side that allows for keyless opening. Specifications: Color: Multicolor Package Includes: 1 pair of glasses, 1 whistle, 1 watch, 1 baton, 1 grenade, 1 pair of handcuffs with key, 1 police badge, 1 walkie-talkie, 1 work ID card Material: Plastic Note: Due to manual measurement, dimensions may vary slightly.
